nasb.text: On the day after the Passover, on that very day, they ate some of the produce of the land, unleavened cakes and parched grain.

esv.text: And the day after the Passover, on that very day, they ate of the produce of the land, unleavened cakes and parched grain.

cnv.text: 逾越節後次日，他們吃了那地的出產；就在那一天，吃了無酵餅和烘的穀物。

ccb.text: 第二天他们就吃当地的谷物，吃无酵饼和烤麦穗。
